decks.notes: This deck focuses on aggressively attacking the opponent while utilizing blink effects to protect and reuse key creatures and spells. It aims to establish board presence quickly through cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Quantum Riddler, while using blink spells like Ephemerate and March of Otherworldly Light to protect creatures and trigger powerful effects multiple times. Consign to Memory and Galvanic Discharge provide removal and disruption, while cards like Solitude and Wrath of the Skies offer additional defensive options. Overall, the deck seeks to overwhelm opponents with a combination of aggression and resilience.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly overwhelm your opponent with aggression. With cards like Engineered Explosives, Mox Opal, and Urza's Saga, you can generate a strong board presence and put pressure on your opponent. Emry, Lurker of the Loch and Arcbound Ravager provide additional synergy to further enhance your artifact strategy. Utilize cards like Shadowspear and Metallic Rebuke to disrupt your opponent's game plan while maintaining your aggressive momentum. The deck aims to quickly establish dominance on the battlefield and finish off your opponent before they can mount a defense.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly deploy aggressive creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, Scion of Draco, and Territorial Kavu to deal damage to the opponent swiftly. It also utilizes Leyline of the Guildpact and Leyline Binding to buff its creatures and control the board. Additionally, cards like Stubborn Denial and Lightning Bolt provide removal and protection for key threats. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a strong board presence and efficient removal spells, ultimately leading to a quick victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing artifact creatures and artifacts to quickly overwhelm opponents with aggressive plays. It includes cards that allow for ramping up quickly, generating additional resources, and disrupting opponent's strategies. By combining efficient threats with disruptive elements, the deck aims to establish board presence early and maintain pressure throughout the game. With a mix of artifact synergy and aggressive tactics, this deck is designed to quickly close out games and outpace opponents in the Modern format.

This deck focuses on using creature abilities to assemble a strong board presence and disrupt opponents. It combines sacrifice effects with tutoring abilities to consistently find key creatures for specific situations. By utilizing a toolbox approach, the deck can adapt to various matchups and strategies, making it versatile and powerful in the current Modern format. By carefully managing resources and making strategic decisions, the deck aims to overwhelm and outmaneuver opponents with a combination of aggression and utility.

This deck focuses on utilizing Agatha's Soul Cauldron and Gran-Gran to create a quick and aggressive gameplay strategy. Unearth and Fatestitcher help to bring back key creatures from the graveyard for repeated value. The deck also includes disruption with cards like Thoughtseize and Fatal Push to control the opponent's board. Thassa's Oracle provides a win condition while Pensive Professor and Psychic Frog offer card draw and filtering options. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with early pressure and disruption, ultimately leading to a swift victory.

The deck focuses on assembling a combo that can win the game without needing any lands. By utilizing cards like Goblin Charbelcher, Irencrag Feat, and various rituals, the deck aims to quickly generate a large amount of mana to cast powerful spells like Sundering Eruption or Stormscale Scion. With support from cards like Orim's Chant and Legion Leadership, the deck can protect its combo pieces and ensure a successful win condition. Additionally, the inclusion of Talisman of Conviction and Witch Enchanter provide additional support and card advantage to help the deck reach its goal efficiently.

The main concept of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly establish a board presence with low cost creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, while utilizing burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Lava Dart to clear a path to the opponent's life total. Mishra's Bauble and Expressive Iteration provide card advantage, while Slickshot Show-Off can generate additional value from spells. The deck aims to apply consistent pressure and close out the game quickly before the opponent has a chance to stabilize.

The deck focuses on ramping up mana quickly using cards like Utopia Sprawl and Talisman of Impulse to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End and Karn, the Great Creator. It also utilizes control elements such as Kozilek's Return and Malevolent Rumble to disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with big threats while maintaining board control through a mix of ramp and removal spells. The inclusion of cards like Sowing Mycospawn and Nulldrifter adds card advantage and flexibility to the strategy.

The deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures and efficiently burning down opponents with direct damage spells. It aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent while maintaining card advantage through cantrips and card draw. The creatures in the deck have prowess abilities, rewarding the player for casting spells and further boosting their power. The deck also includes ways to pump up creatures and deal damage, allowing for explosive turns and finishing off opponents quickly. It's a fast-paced and proactive strategy that looks to overwhelm opponents before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on generating massive amounts of mana with rituals and medallions to cast multiple spells in a turn, aiming to storm off and win the game in a single explosive turn. It utilizes Ral, Monsoon Mage's ability to copy spells for extra value and cards like Reckless Impulse and Grapeshot to deal damage to opponents. The deck also includes cards like Wish and Glimpse the Impossible to search for combo pieces and dig deeper into the deck. Overall, the key strategy is to chain spells together to create a lethal storm combo.

This Amulet Titan deck relies on combining the use of Amulet of Vigor with Primeval Titan to ramp up mana quickly and efficiently. The deck focuses on tutoring for key lands and utilizing land synergies to generate a massive amount of mana, allowing for explosive plays and quick victories. It also includes various utility lands and spells to support the combo and protect against disruption. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with powerful threats and efficient resource management, making it a formidable force in Modern 1 vs 1 matches.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays using a combination of creatures and burn spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. The key strategy revolves around deploying threats like Phlage, Titan of Fire's Fury and Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer, while also utilizing cards like Goblin Bombardment and Galvanic Discharge to clear the way and deal additional damage. Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Guide of Souls provide support and synergy with the deck's aggressive game plan. The inclusion of Seasoned Pyromancer and Thraben Charm offers additional utility and card advantage to maintain pressure on the opponent.

This deck focuses on using counterspells and removal to control the board and stall the game until key threats like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Shark Typhoon can take over. The deck also utilizes card draw and selection cards like Archmage's Charm and Consult the Star Charts to maintain card advantage and find the right answers. This strategy aims to outlast and outvalue the opponent, ultimately winning through attrition and powerful late game plays.

The deck focuses on utilizing artifacts to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By combining powerful artifacts with efficient creatures like Arcbound Ravager and Emry, Lurker of the Loch, the deck aims to control the game through card advantage and synergy. Cards like Mishra's Bauble and Tormod's Crypt provide additional utility and disruption, while Urza's Saga helps to tutor for key artifacts. Overall, the deck is designed to be fast, versatile, and unpredictable, pressuring opponents and disrupting their game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using cards like Utopia Sprawl and Eldrazi Temple, to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures such as Emrakul, the Promised End and World Breaker. The deck also includes control elements like Kozilek's Return and Malevolent Rumble to deal with opposing threats. The inclusion of cards like Karn, the Great Creator and Ugin, the Eye of the Storms provide additional versatility and control options. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with powerful Eldrazi creatures while controlling the game with various spells and abilities.
